name: yuan-skill
description: Yuan Knowledge Base Skill 工厂：通过结构化追问帮用户把模糊需求变清晰，理解项目架构，创建或修改 skill。
trigger: When the user wants to create a new skill, modify an existing skill, or needs help understanding the skill system.
workflow: 1. Read project-architecture.md to understand the Yuan Knowledge Base workspace structure and rules.
2. Read existing-skills-inventory.md to understand the capabilities and boundaries of existing skills.
3. If modifying an existing skill, read its current files (skill.json, flow.md, python/markdown scripts) to establish a baseline.
4. Follow flow.md Phase 1: run the Entry Gate to decide if structured clarification is needed (for both creation and modification requests).
5. If clarification is needed: build the Ambiguity Map (tailored for creation or modification), rank unknowns as P0/P1/P2, and execute decision rounds.
6. Once intent is clear: for creation, classify into 4 patterns and generate; for modification, plan targeted, minimal edits without breaking existing features.
7. Follow flow.md Phase 3 to verify the generated or modified skill files.
constraints: Never modify server.py — new skills must work via Agent self-discovery, not hardcoded routing
Always check existing-skills-inventory.md before creating to avoid overlap
Generated/modified skill files must follow conventions in project-architecture.md
All created or modified files must be under skills/<skill-name>/ directory
